description: Plamen pipeline watchdog - artifact requirements per phase. L1 mode overrides use 'l1_*' prefixed fields which are picked up when mode starts with 'l1'.

recon.gate_message: Recon incomplete. Missing artifacts block Phase 2 instantiation. Ensure all 4 recon agents have completed.
recon.l1_gate_message: L1 recon incomplete. Missing threat_model / subsystem_map / attack_surface / trust_boundaries / template_recommendations / scope_leftover / recon_summary / primitive_status artifacts. Ensure the L1 recon phase completed and Phase 0.5 Bake wrote primitive_status.md.

breadth.gate_message: Breadth analysis incomplete. At least 3 first-pass analysis_*.md files required before proceeding to re-scan or inventory.
breadth.l1_gate_message: L1 breadth analysis incomplete. At least 2 analysis_*.md files required (one per detected subsystem layer).

inventory.gate_message: Findings inventory not created. Cannot proceed to semantic invariants or depth without findings_inventory.md.

rescan.gate_message: Breadth re-scan required in Thorough mode before inventory. At least 1 analysis_rescan_*.md file needed.

per_contract.gate_message: Per-contract analysis required in Thorough mode. At least 1 analysis_percontract_*.md file needed.

semantic_invariants.gate_message: Semantic invariants analysis not complete. Required in Core/Thorough mode before depth loop.

scanner_artifacts.description: At least 1 scanner/validation output must exist (any naming convention)

depth.gate_message: Depth loop incomplete. Missing required depth/scanner/validation artifacts.
depth.l1_gate_message: L1 depth loop incomplete. Need at least 3 depth_*_findings.md (e.g. depth_consensus_invariant / depth_network_surface / depth_state_trace). No scanner or blind-spot artifacts required in L1 mode.

recovery_hints.depth_*_findings.md: Spawn depth agents (consensus-invariant, network-surface, state-trace, external, edge-case) per plamen-l1.md Step 4b. Each writes depth_{type}_findings.md via §WRITE-THEN-VERIFY.
recovery_hints.design_stress_findings.md: Spawn Design Stress Testing agent (sonnet, 1 slot, UNCONDITIONAL in Thorough). Read phase4b-scanner-templates.md Design Stress section.
recovery_hints.perturbation_findings.md: Spawn Finding Perturbation agent (sonnet). Read phase4b-loop.md Perturbation section. Applies DIRECTION_FLIP and other operators to existing findings.
recovery_hints.skill_execution_gaps.md: Spawn Skill Execution Checklist agent (haiku). Read phase4b-loop.md Skill Checklist section. Verifies depth agents executed all skill steps.
recovery_hints.symmetric_pairs.md: Orchestrator-produced (pre-depth). Read phase4b-loop.md Symmetric Pairs section: extract symmetric pairs (deposit/withdraw, mint/burn, lock/unlock, etc.) from function_list.md and write a compact table to {SCRATCHPAD}/symmetric_pairs.md. Inject the table into each depth agent's prompt.
recovery_hints.variable_finding_map.md: Spawn variable_map_agent (sonnet). Read phase4b-loop.md Variable-Finding Cross-Reference section (lines 450-468). Agent reads semantic_invariants.md + findings_inventory.md, greps for variable→finding references, writes a 30-row table for chain analysis precision.
recovery_hints.confidence_scores.md: Spawn confidence scoring agent (sonnet). Read rules/phase4-confidence-scoring.md for the 4-axis model.
recovery_hints.rag_validation.md: Spawn RAG Validation Sweep agent (sonnet). Read rules/phase4-confidence-scoring.md Phase 4b.5 section. If MCP fails, write floor scores (0.3).

chain.gate_message: Chain analysis incomplete. Missing hypothesis grouping or chain matching artifacts.

verification.gate_message: Verification incomplete. At least 1 verify_*.md file required before report generation. Core/Thorough mode also requires cross_batch_consistency.md (Phase 5.2). Thorough adds skeptic_findings.md + skeptic_judge_decisions.md (Phase 5.1).

report.gate_message: Report index not created. Report tier writers cannot proceed without report_index.md.
